title: Vlog page request
description:
Hi, this is inline w/ Re: Proposed vlog page - J403 Integrity Roofing

Adding info from AM: 
Client would like  to shift their Healthy Home Habits page to be more of a vlog page where they can easily post new videos, and they can be organized with the newest at the top. Please take a look at her request and see what it would take to do this.

Hi, I am including everyone on this because I know it's a bigger ask, but it's one I have been waiting on since before we switched over to Clixsy in February.

We want to shift the Healthy Home Habits page to be more of a general educational vlog about building envelope solutions.

https://integrityrc.com/healthy-home-habits

Right now, it is very laborious to add new videos, and they get added to the bottom of the page instead of the top. 

Is it possible to create a vlog post category that would have its own video page template and Vlog listing (similar to how our written blog functions)?

I want to increase the amount of videos we have on our website in an organized way that will support our credibility for SEO and AEO.  I think this would help greatly.

For us then it seems like what they are looking for is some sort of CPT where they can add a video embed link and a video title and description into the box. Maybe there could be schema added as well, along with any metadata that might be useful for SEO? The videos would have to stack latest at the top as well on the index page.

Please  build something like that, and can you have a look in the backend to see what she means by "...currently laborious to add new videos"?

Thanks much!

cc

title: Landing Page Build
assignees: Mary De Guzman, Mubeen Dildar-Mia, Naas Van Zyl, Predrag
description:
Seeking help w/ the client request to build a new landing page please.

The client is getting ready to launch our $100,000 Great Big Give Back and need a landing page for this referral initiative. They have mocked up a page so we can see what they have in mind, and attached all of their assets.

*They do not yet have the form we are going to embed on the page. That is being created.
*They did not provide a desired URL so we may need one from our end.

FAQ

Do I get $500 no matter what?
No. You get paid based on the completion of a job. We have 4 tiers. 
Job Cost Advocate Fee Customer Rebate
$3000-$4999 $75 $75
$5000-$9999 $125 $125
$10,000-$19,999 $250 $250
$20,000+ $500 $500

When do I get paid?
You get paid AFTER the job is completed and the final invoice paid.

Can I refer myself?
Sorta. If you found Integrity all on your own, and you found your way to this program, you can still sign up. There are a few extra steps, like putting a yard sign at your house for the week before and after your roofing job. You will receive the rebate, but not the advocate fee. PLUS! It puts you in the position to be able to refer other people to the program.

What do I get paid in?
You get to choose from a myriad of gift cards or cash straight to your bank account. It’s up to you. 

Please do let us know what else we may need from the client.


cc  

Thanks much!

title: Please accept access to the Kirkland and Everett GBPs. They're suspended but we should now have a...
Gig Harbor GBP With Artondale Mention on GBP
assignees: Anamaria Avram, Mikey King, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Hey wanted to share a couple of things we found that are interesting and brings the question of maybe we should create another service area/lander for this Artondale location?

Gig Harbor's GBP, is in fact an address for Gig Harbor, however, Google is also listing this on their GBP.
"Roofing contractor in Artondale, Washington"

If you look at the city boundaries it clearly shows that this address technically is inside Artondale's boundaries, but that the address is in fact correct to use Gig Harbor. As well as all the other GBPs and companies nearby are using Gig Harbor too?

So this brought up the thought that why not take advantage of this and create an Artondale landing/service area page, and capitalize on these signals however we can?

I wanted to gather your thoughts on this too and see if we should do anything more and/or just to brainstorm on this.

Clayton already gave the green light, just in case you were wondering, on building the lander and how we should definitely take note of these things and action what we think is good, and of course loop you in always.

Here's some images for reference. Would love to talk shop with ya brother, and let me know who I should create the task to build the content for unless you prefer to handle it?

note - the heart is Integrity Roofing GBP

I'm not sure where these two new locations came from exactly, or what was discussed with the client about them?
 Only that when we were assigned to create citations for them.

I assume these are new locations where they will be creating GBPs for, and we are putting signals in place before doing so. But I want to check in and confirm with everyone.


I just added them to the Footer task to get them added back in, since I noticed they were added recently to the old footer and then removed when we recreated the footer.

title: Form Filtering
description:
Seeking help if this request is possible on the site please. 

Client would like to split our leads to go to different Acculynx accounts based on different factors.  To do this I'm looking to use Zapier.
  • Zip code - Portland vs Coeur d'alene vs Seattle
  • Service Needed - Commercial Roofing - Commercial Acculynx

It may be user error but when trying to connect Gravity Forms to Zapier it keeps asking me to update Gravity Forms.  Can you see if there's anything we need to do connect REST API to Zapier?


Thanks much!

title: Form audits on the site
description:
Hi seeking help, can you please do an audit for all the forms on their site please.

We will need the audit to show the following:
- name of the form
- an example where the form can be found
- the text of all the terms & conditions for each of the forms

Thanks much!

cc

title: Build signal for Gig Harbor
description:
Hi, this was brought up during the client call earlier.

Seeking help if we can please create the page to help send signal for their Gig Harbor location. 

Notes from the call: 
-they are adding another location in Gig Harbor but the video verification has not been accepted by Google yet. 
-they will try to figure out how to add a sign in order to get Google to accept it. 
-right now we will need to generate signals: its in the footer and need a page [incase we don’t have one yet] 
-this will help Google see that this an actual location 

Thanks much!
